name: Caramel-Apple Euphoria
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and cut each apple into 18 wedges; set aside.
2. Combine the apple juice, unwrapped caramel candies, vanilla extract, cardamom, and cinnamon in a bowl.
3. Gradually add peanut butter, one teaspoon at a time, to the mixture and stir.
4. Add the apple wedges; cover and cook on LOW for 5 hours.
5. Stir thoroughly, then cook an additional hour.
6. Serve approximately 1/3 cup of warm mixture over a slice of angel food cake or ice cream.
